title: Daniel Jin
description: Daniel Jin Blum, PhD, is a sleep psychologist and Research Assistant Professor at NYU Shanghai. Dr. Blum’s research focuses on the intersections of circadian, sleep, and metabolic health, specifically, the impact of eating and fasting rhythms on circadian desynchrony and its negative sequelae. Prior
